subject: Project Management
title: The International Space Station
description: Learn The International Space Station in one minute.

hook.text: Sixteen nations built a football-field-sized laboratory orbiting Earth at 28,000 km/h.

buildup.text: The first module launched in 1998. Over 40 missions delivered pieces to assemble in orbit.

discovery.text: Astronauts from different countries live and work together for months at a time, 400 km above Earth.

twist.text: The ISS cost over $150 billion — the most expensive object ever built by humans.

climax.text: For 25 years, the ISS has proven that rival nations can cooperate on the hardest projects.

punchline.text: The most expensive thing ever built is also the most cooperative.

quiz.question: How many nations contributed to building the ISS?
